remarks: Welcome to this sun-drenched 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom ranch, perfectly situated on a quiet, highly desirable cul-de-sac in the heart of Mid-Ridges. Offering the perfect blend of suburban tranquility and everyday convenience-**located just 5 minutes from the Merritt Parkway and less than 20 minutes to the Stamford train station and I-95**  Step inside to an open and inviting floor plan bathed in beautiful natural light. The spacious living room and dining room combination flow seamlessly, creating an ideal space for both daily living and hosting guests. The heart of the home is the bright eat-in kitchen, which features direct access to a private brick-paver patio-perfect for your morning coffee. This cozy nook connects effortlessly to a larger back patio, making indoor-outdoor entertaining a breeze.  Down the hall, the primary suite serves as a peaceful retreat, complete with double closets and its own private en-suite bathroom. Two additional generously sized bedrooms and a second full hallway bath complete the main level.   The living space extends to the finished lower level, featuring a versatile room. Whether you need a quiet home office, a private home gym, a playroom, or a media den, the possibilities here are endless!  Outside, enjoy your own private oasis on an oversized, beautifully landscaped .75-acre lot. With lush greenery and plenty of room this property is truly special.  *square footage listed does not include finished lower level*
